---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new agent type, routing capability, or server improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve or what use case does it unlock?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you'd like. Be as specific as possible — include example code, config snippets, or API shapes if relevant.

```typescript
// Example: new agent interface, bindings config entry, etc.
```

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've already tried or considered, and why you prefer the proposed approach.

## Additional context

Any other context, links to related issues, or prior art (open-source projects, blog posts, docs) that informed this request.
